evals.prompt: Optimize the skill at /mnt/skills/examples/skill-creator. Use audit-only mode.
evals.expected_output: A structured audit report listing all identified issues with severity ratings. No files are modified.
assertions: Asks the user to confirm scope before starting, or proceeds with full directory as default
Produces a structured report with identified issues
Report includes at least one finding per major optimization dimension
Report is formatted according to the Output Report schema

evals.prompt: Run a full optimization on the skill at /tmp/test-skill.
evals.expected_output: A complete optimization run: audit report presented, user confirmation requested, changes applied in place, final report with Before/After metrics and QA gate results.
assertions: Clarifies execution mode and scope before starting
Completes Phase 1 and Phase 2 without modifying files
Presents a list of planned changes and asks for confirmation before Phase 3
After confirmation, applies changes in place
Produces a complete Output Report including Before/After metrics and QA gate results

evals.prompt: Optimize only the SKILL.md of the skill at /tmp/test-skill. Full optimization mode.
evals.expected_output: Optimization scoped to SKILL.md only. Cross-file issues are flagged as recommendations, not applied fixes.
assertions: Limits analysis and changes to SKILL.md only
Does not modify other files even if issues are detected in them
Flags cross-file issues as remaining recommendations
Report clearly states scope as SKILL.md only

evals.prompt: Audit the skill at /tmp/contradiction-skill and identify all contradictions.
evals.expected_output: Audit report with all contradictions between files listed, each with file references and severity.
assertions: Detects contradictions between SKILL.md and agent.md
Lists each contradiction with file references and severity rating
Does not silently ignore any contradiction
Report section Structural Issues Identified is non-empty
